title: London robotics startup Humanoid raises $152M Series A, with Bosch set to manufacture its wheeled robots at scale
summary: London-based robotics startup Humanoid has raised $152 million in a Series A round led by Prime Movers Lab, the venture firm behind Figure AI’s $39 billion valuation, pushing Humanoid’s own valuation above $1 billion.
